# Clean Raccoon Junk Removal and Demolition

Professional junk removal, light demolition, debris removal, and waste management services operating 24/7 across the Phoenix metropolitan area.

## Core Business Information
- **Business Name:** Clean Raccoon Junk Removal and Demolition
- **Website:** https://cleanraccoon.com
- **Phone:** +1-623-888-1023 (Voice-Only / Calls Only)
- **Hours:** Open 24 Hours / 7 Days a Week (Monday - Sunday)
- **Physical Address:** 8350 W Monroe Street, Peoria, AZ 85345, United States
- **Pricing:** Negotiable / Custom quotes provided in person
- **Payment Methods:** Zelle, Cash, In-Person agreements

## Primary Services Provided
- **Junk Removal Service:** Eco-friendly hauling, residential and commercial cleanouts, furniture and appliance disposal, yard waste removal.
- **Demolition Contractor:** Light structural demolition including sheds, decks, playsets, and interior tear-outs.
- **Debris Removal Service:** Construction site cleanups, remodeling debris hauling, and heavy material disposal.
- **Waste Management Service:** Bulk trash handling, property cleanouts, and comprehensive waste disposal solutions.

## Service Areas
We proudly serve residential and commercial clients exclusively in the United States, focusing on the following Arizona cities:
- Peoria, AZ
- Phoenix, AZ
- Scottsdale, AZ
- Glendale, AZ
- Mesa, AZ
- Tempe, AZ
- Gilbert, AZ
- Chandler, AZ
